name: Chaika Trabant
nativeName: チャイカ・トラバント
description: Chaika is usually an optimistic girl that longs to help everyone, regardless of who they are. Her speech pattern differs from the rest of the characters and speaks in the "Laake" language fluently but to avoid confusion Chaika speaks the common tongue (the official language of the continent). However, because it is not her native tongue, Chaika's language fragmented and broken. Chaika is scared easily, as seen when Akari was telling them a scary rumor. Chaika can be very clumsy sometimes too.
searchTerms: チャイカ・トラバント

description: __Height__: 157 cm (5'2") - 162 cm (5'3") (Season 2) Elizabeth (who demands to be called by the more affectionate "Lizzie") is Ciel's cousin and fiancée. She is the daughter of Ciel's aunt, Frances, and her husband, Marquis Midford. Lizzie is strong-willed and cheerful, with a fondness for cute things. name: Alina Clover
description: __Height:__ 155 cm A young receptionist at the Iffole Counter, having worked there for three years. She has a first-class license, given to the top 10% of those with powers. Though she herself doesn't understand why she can use her divine realm skills, she has the power to destroy relics with one hand, which makes her an extremely powerful fighter. In order to live a carefree life, she finishes overtime work the same day, as she grew tired of rolling it over to the next day.
mediaTitles: I May Be a Guild Receptionist, but I’ll Solo Any Boss to Clock Out on Time
I May Be a Guild Receptionist, but I’ll Solo Any Boss to Clock Out on Time

name: Kanata Konoe
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") Kanata Konoe is one of thirteen members of the Nijigasaki High School Idol Club. She was a member of the original group and is a member of QU4RTZ, a unit under Nijigaku. She is a third year student and her image color is violet. Kanata is always giving everything her all... even if it doesn't seem that way when she dozes off in the middle of conversations. She cares deeply for her little sister Haruka and will find a bottomless well of energy in matters relating to her.
mediaTitles: Love Live! Nijigasaki High School Idol Club
Love Live! Nijigasaki High School Idol Club Season 2

name: Kyou Kasahara
description: __Sports Team:__ Badminton __School:__ Eimei Junior and Senior High __Year:__ Junior High Third-Year A third-year middle school student and a member of Elmei Junior and Senior High's boys' badminton team. He is friends with both [Taiki Inomata](https://anilist.co/character/191242) and [Hina Chono](https://anilist.co/character/218648/Hina-Chono). In the _Ao no Hako_ oneshot, Kyo is instead a member of his school's shogi club.

name: Markl
description: Howl's apprentice. He is an orphan who lives in Howl's castle. His apprenticeship in magic largely consists of running errands and doing the shopping. In the book he is a fifteen year old boy named Michael Fisher, in love with Sophie's half-sister, Martha.

name: Prinz Eugen
description: Prinz Eugen is a Major Antagonist in Azur Lane the Animation and later becomes a support character in Episode 11.

name: Sakie Satou
description: A succubus who works as a math teacher. Due to the aphrodisiac her body produces, she constantly has to take precautions to avoid inadvertently seducing her male students, such as wearing a tracksuit and taking early trains. While her nature as a succubus leads several males to become attracted to her, she herself develops a crush on Tetsuo. (Source: Wikipedia)
mediaTitles: Interviews with Monster Girls: The Demi-chans' Summer Break
searchTerms: Interviews with Monster Girls: The Demi-chans' Summer Break

name: Shuuya Kano
description: Kano is a young man who is part of the Mekakushi Dan. He outwardly has an unfocused, aloof personality and always has a smile on his face. Because he teases Marry, Momo, and Kido a lot, he's often considered to be a flirt, but when it counts, he's worth relying on. His actual personality, which he hides behind his ability the majority of the time, is quite subdued and mature. ~!He seems to be mistrustful of others and carries around self-loathing tendencies, believing himself to be "useless". !~

name: Wave
description: Wave is a member of the Jaegers who is very similar to Tatsumi. He is from a small town on the coast where he served in the Imperial Navy, and brought a massive bag full of seafood with him when he joined the Jaegers. Also similar to Tatsumi, he is often used for Comic Relief. When he first arrived at the meeting room for his new group, he first encountered Bors, who ignored him shyly until the rest of the crew showed up. name: Kae Serinuma
description: A nerdy and chubby girl in second year of high school. She's a fujoshi obsessed with BL and otome games. After spending a week without eating due to sadness after the death of her favourite character, she loses weight and becomes stunning, earning four suitors.

description: __Height:__ 183 cm Yoi Takiguchi's senpai. The male prince of the school.

name: Kuukaku Shiba
description: __Height:__ 168cm Kūkaku is an ill-tempered fireworks expert who is particularly known for her ridiculously-themed houses. During the Bount arc of the anime, she states that she is the same age as Kisuke Urahara. She wears a prosthetic right arm in the anime, which is at odds with her scenes in the manga, where she is illustrated with just a stump. She assists Ichigo and company by launching them via her special Kakaku Cannon so they can enter Seireitei. Kūkaku is part of the former noble clan S

name: Ena Saitou
description: Rin’s friend, a free spirited person who goes at her own pace. She’s not a member of the outdoor crew, but she occasionally shows interest in their activities. She also gives casual advice to Rin, who is bad at dealing with people. She has a dog called 'Chikuwa.' (Source: Honey's Anime)

description: __Height:__ 188 cm __Affiliation:__ Humming Bird Crew [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/hannam_x_jordan/) Dom is a Junior at Sunny High School. He is the son of a gang leader. He is interested in making music in the future and works part-time as a DJ at his father's club, WD Club. He is quite the sneakerhead and spends his money on his collection. name: Kokoro Tsurumaki
description: __Height:__ 155 cm (5'1") A happy-go-lucky student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and the leader and vocalist of Hello, Happy World!. Her family is ridiculously rich and lives in one of the biggest houses in the area. She's the only member of her school's astronomy club. Kokoro is an idealistic and charismatic young girl whose goal in life is to make the entire world smile.
